flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at Tulsa Community College fell 20% between 2006 and 2009 (16.6% → 13.4%).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Tulsa Community College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($3.4k → $3.8k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Tulsa Community College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.3% → 0.0%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Tulsa Community College rose 28% between 2006 and 2009 (13.1k → 16.8k).
